_meta.voice_notes: Sharp, competitive, slightly playful with a dash of edge. Imperative or first-person 'I'. Stakes are real, punishments are worse. No corporate-fitness or wellness-blog phrasing. No emoji in titles unless load-bearing.

categories.fitness: Body, movement, gym, cardio, strength, sleep, nutrition. Largest category by usage. Skews 22-35.
categories.habits: Discipline-flavored personal habits. Reading, meditation, screen time, no-spend, journaling, language learning. Less spicy than fitness; more cerebral.
categories.party: Drinking games, party-night dares, group games. Mature-flagged by default. Skews 21-30, urban, social.
categories.dares: Stunts, embarrassments, single-event challenges. Distinct from party — dares can be solo. Higher mature-flag rate.
categories.family: Bets between parents, siblings, parent-and-adult-child. NOT bets where minors are gambling participants — kids appear as subjects of parent-side bets only. Punishments domestic and gentle.
categories.goals: Work, learning, side projects, career, finances. Mature-flag rare; longer durations; larger stakes.
categories.couples: Two-person mutual challenges. Many domestic-life. Default 1v1 format and longer durations.
categories.travel: Trip-scoped bets. Activate during a trip rather than calendar window. Bucket-list dares, foreign-food challenges, per-city stunts.

tags_glossary.head_to_head: Comparison bet — first to N, more than the other.
tags_glossary.deadline: Bet ends on a specific calendar date.
tags_glossary.ongoing: No end date until someone breaks it.
tags_glossary.daily: Activates every day for the duration.
tags_glossary.trip_scoped: Activates during a trip rather than a calendar duration. Travel-specific.
tags_glossary.forfeit: The bet IS a punishment for the loser.
